[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I'm feeling really disheartened and angry after Erdoğan's victory. It feels like our voices are being silenced, and the concentration of power in his hands is terrifying. I just hope that the opposition can find a way to unite and challenge this new reality.

[T002] Turkish Lira Currency Crisis — US-Turkey Brunson Sanctions: I'm feeling really frustrated and scared about the economic situation right now. The currency crisis is hitting us hard, and it's hard to see a way out. I just hope that the opposition can rally and provide a real alternative to this chaos.

[T003] ECHR Orders Demirtaş Release — Turkey Refuses: I'm feeling really frustrated by the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş. It just reinforces my belief that the institutions are not functioning properly and makes me more determined to support the opposition.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling a mix of anger and hope after the local elections. The loss of Ankara and Istanbul for the AKP gives me hope that change is possible, but I'm still frustrated with the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling a mix of anger and hope after İmamoğlu's landslide win in Istanbul. This shows that change is possible, but the government's actions are still deeply frustrating.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and sadness after the tragic femicide of Emine Bulut. It's heartbreaking to see how women are not safe in our society, and it makes me feel even more frustrated with the government's failure to protect us.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I'm feeling overwhelmed by the government's handling of the COVID-19 pandemic and the economic fallout. It's frustrating to see how little support is being offered to those of us who are struggling.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm deeply frustrated and angry about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It feels like a direct attack on women's rights and safety, and it's hard to see any hope for change in this political climate.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the HDP closure case. It feels like an attack on democracy and the rights of Kurdish people, and it's disheartening to see the government continue to undermine opposition parties.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm really frustrated with how the economy is collapsing. The lira's devaluation is hitting us hard, and it feels like the government's decisions are only making things worse. I just want a stable future for myself and my community.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm really upset about the parliament's decision to reject the pension hike. It feels like the government is ignoring the struggles of the elderly, and with the economy in such a bad state, it’s hard to stay hopeful.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling really frustrated and angry about the government's failure to address the cost-of-living crisis. It feels like they're completely out of touch with the struggles we face every day.

[T001] 2018 Presidential & Parliamentary Elections — Erdoğan Wins First Round: I'm feeling really disheartened and angry after Erdoğan's victory. It feels like our voices are being silenced, and the concentration of power in his hands is terrifying. I just hope that the opposition can find a way to unite and challenge this new reality.

The currency crisis is hitting us hard, and it's hard to see a way out. I just hope that the opposition can rally and provide a real alternative to this chaos.

[T004] March 2019 Local Elections — AKP Loses Ankara and Istanbul: I'm feeling a mix of anger and hope after the local elections. The loss of Ankara and Istanbul for the AKP gives me hope that change is possible, but I'm still frustrated with the government's refusal to comply with the ECHR ruling on Demirtaş.

[T005] YSK Annuls Istanbul Election — Rerun Ordered, İmamoğlu Wins by Landslide: I'm feeling a mix of anger and hope after İmamoğlu's landslide win in Istanbul. This shows that change is possible, but the government's actions are still deeply frustrating.

[T006] Emine Bulut Femicide — '#OlmekIstemiyorum' Goes Viral: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and sadness after the tragic femicide of Emine Bulut. It's heartbreaking to see how women are not safe in our society, and it makes me feel even more frustrated with the government's failure to protect us.

[T007] COVID-19 Pandemic — Partial Lockdowns, Economic Shock: I'm feeling overwhelmed by the government's handling of the COVID-19 pandemic and the economic fallout. It's frustrating to see how little support is being offered to those of us who are struggling.

[T008] Turkey Withdraws from Istanbul Convention on Women's Rights: I'm deeply frustrated and angry about the government's decision to withdraw from the Istanbul Convention. It feels like a direct attack on women's rights and safety, and it's hard to see any hope for change in this political climate.

[T009] HDP Closure Case Filed — Party Under Existential Legal Threat: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration about the HDP closure case. It feels like an attack on democracy and the rights of Kurdish people, and it's disheartening to see the government continue to undermine opposition parties.

[T010] Lira Free-Fall — 60% Devaluation in 2021 After Central Bank Rate Cuts: I'm really frustrated with how the economy is collapsing. The lira's devaluation is hitting us hard, and it feels like the government's decisions are only making things worse. I just want a stable future for myself and my community.

[T011] Parliament Rejects Pension Hike to Minimum Wage — Pensioner Anger: I'm really upset about the parliament's decision to reject the pension hike. It feels like the government is ignoring the struggles of the elderly, and with the economy in such a bad state, it’s hard to stay hopeful.

[T012] Inflation Peaks at 80%+ — Worst Cost-of-Living Crisis in 24 Years: I'm feeling really frustrated and angry about the government's failure to address the cost-of-living crisis. It feels like they're completely out of touch with the struggles we face every day.

[T013] İmamoğlu Sentenced to 2.5 Years — Opposition Rallies Around Him: I'm really upset about İmamoğlu's sentencing. It feels like the government is trying to silence the opposition, and it's making me even more determined to support the CHP and stand against this injustice.

[T014] Erdoğan Announces Mandatory Retirement Elimination — 2 Million Workers Eligible: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration over Erdoğan's recent announcement. While some workers might find relief, it feels like a desperate attempt to buy votes before the elections, and it doesn't address the underlying economic issues.

[T015] Constitutional Court Freezes HDP Treasury Aid: I'm really angry about the Constitutional Court freezing HDP's treasury aid. It feels like a direct attack on Kurdish political representation and a way to undermine opposition voices before the elections.

[T016] EQ-A: Kahramanmaraş Earthquake Day — 7.8 and 7.7 Magnitude Double Strike: I'm in shock after the earthquake. It's hard to think about politics right now when so many lives are at stake. The government's response is critical, and I hope they don't fail us again.

[T017] EQ-B: AFAD Response Chaos — Rescue Teams Delayed, Deaths Mount: I feel a deep sense of anger and frustration watching the government's failure to respond to the earthquake. With so many lives at stake and the death toll rising, it's hard to have any faith in their ability to lead us through this crisis.

[T018] EQ-C: Twitter/TikTok Banned During Earthquake Rescue — Public Outcry: I feel a mix of anger and sadness at the government's response to the earthquake, especially with the recent ban on Twitter and TikTok during a critical time for rescue coordination. It's frustrating to see how the government prioritizes control over effective communication in a crisis.

[T019] EQ-D: Erdoğan Admits Response Problems, Visits Disaster Zone: I'm feeling a mix of anger and frustration at the government's delayed response to the earthquake. Erdoğan's admission of failure is a step, but it feels too little, too late, especially with the ban on social media during such a critical time.

[T020] EQ-E: Contractors Arrested — Construction Amnesty and Building Safety Scandal: I'm feeling a deep sense of anger and frustration over the government's corruption and negligence that led to the recent construction scandals. The fact that so many lives were lost due to their policies is infuriating, and it makes me question how much longer we can tolerate this kind of governance.

[T021] EQ-F: Opposition Mayors Respond — CHP Aid vs. Government Aid Narrative Battle: I'm really frustrated with how the government is handling the earthquake response. The opposition mayors are stepping up, showing that they can actually care for the people, while the government seems to be blocking aid. It's hard to stay hopeful when the system feels so corrupt.

[T022] EQ-G: National Mourning, Reconstruction Promises, and Electoral Rescheduling Debate: I'm feeling increasingly frustrated with the government's handling of the earthquake response. The opposition seems to be stepping up while the ruling party is making promises that feel empty. It's hard to stay hopeful in such a corrupt system.

[T023] OPP-A: Akşener Leaves Table of Six — Opposition Crisis: I'm feeling really frustrated with the opposition right now. Akşener leaving the Table of Six is a huge setback, and it makes me worry that we won't be able to unite against Erdoğan. It's hard to stay hopeful when it feels like our best chance is slipping away.

[T024] OPP-B: Opposition Reunites — Kılıçdaroğlu Nominated with İmamoğlu/Yavaş VP Formula: I'm feeling a mix of relief and cautious optimism with the opposition uniting behind Kılıçdaroğlu. However, I still have concerns about their ability to effectively challenge Erdoğan. The internal conflicts have left me feeling fatigued and frustrated.

[T025] Constitutional Court Lifts HDP Treasury Aid Freeze: I'm feeling a mix of cautious optimism with the Constitutional Court lifting the HDP treasury aid freeze, but the ongoing closure case still worries me. It's good to see some support for Kılıçdaroğlu, but I remain skeptical about the opposition's overall strength against Erdoğan.

[T026] Erdoğan Announces Pension Increase to 7,500 Lira — Pre-Election Largesse: I'm feeling quite frustrated with Erdoğan's pension increase, as it seems like a desperate attempt to buy votes before the elections. While I recognize the struggles of retirees, this move feels insincere given the high inflation and the gap between pensions and living costs. I still believe in the opposition, but their ability to capitalize on this situation is uncertain.

[T027] HDP/YSP Formally Endorses Kılıçdaroğlu — Kurdish Vote Behind Opposition: I'm feeling a mix of hope and frustration with the HDP's endorsement of Kılıçdaroğlu. While it energizes the opposition and could bring in crucial votes, it also risks alienating some nationalist voters who may frame this support negatively.

[T028] Erdoğan Raises Civil Servant Salaries 45% — Five Days Before Election: I'm really frustrated with Erdoğan's last-minute salary increase. It feels like a desperate attempt to buy votes rather than a genuine solution to the economic crisis we're facing.

[T029] CAND-A: Muharrem İnce Withdraws — Citing Smear Campaign / Deepfake Video: I'm really upset about İnce's withdrawal. It feels like a huge blow to the anti-Erdoğan movement, and the smear campaign is just another example of how low politics can go. I hope Kılıçdaroğlu can still rally the support needed to win.
